mainEntity.name: What kind of business results can voice assistant optimization drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: A strong outcome is being the answer for high-intent questions instead of just another search result. That can mean more calls, more directions requests, more bookings, or more qualified website visits depending on your business.
acceptedAnswer.description: It can drive calls, bookings, directions requests, and qualified visits when the content matches high-intent questions. The payoff is strongest for businesses with local or immediate needs.
